ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accreditation_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the accreditation agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the accreditation agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the accreditation agency is based */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the accreditation agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the accreditation agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the accreditation agency's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the agency was established */,
  "scope_of_accreditation" TEXT /* Description of the types of institutions and programmes the agency can accredit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hei" (
  "hei_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each higher education institution */,
  "hei_name" TEXT /* Name of the higher education institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the institution was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled */,
  "number_of_faculty" INTEGER /* Current number of faculty members */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, research) */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Current accreditation status of the institution */,
  "last_accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last accreditation review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hei_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programmes" (
  "programme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programme */,
  "hei_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HEI offering the programme */,
  "programme_name" TEXT /* Name of the programme */,
  "degree_title" TEXT /* Title of the degree awarded by the programme */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., SCD integrated, SCD) */,
  "accreditation_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the accreditation period */,
  "accreditation_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the accreditation period */,
  "programme_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the programme */,
  "programme_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the programme (e.g., 2 years, 4 years) */,
  "mode_of_delivery" TEXT /* Mode of programme delivery (e.g., on-campus, online, hybrid) */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the programme */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the programme */,
  "programme_director" TEXT /* Name of the programme director */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the programme */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("programme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programmes_hei_id FOREIGN KEY ("hei_id") REFERENCES hei ("hei_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation_details" (
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation event */,
  "programme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programme being accredited */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accreditation agency */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Status of the accreditation (e.g., granted, pending, denied) */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date when the accreditation was granted or reviewed */,
  "accreditation_report" TEXT /* Summary of the accreditation report */,
  "next_accreditation_visit_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next accreditation visit */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes from the accreditation process */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer who conducted the accreditation */,
  "reviewer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_details_programme_id FOREIGN KEY ("programme_id") REFERENCES programmes ("programme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditation_details_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES accreditation_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, HEI representative, agency staff) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "programme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programme */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., accreditation report, programme brochure) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path where the document is stored */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_programme_id FOREIGN KEY ("programme_id") REFERENCES programmes ("programme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "programme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programme */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who sent the communication */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the communication */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the communication was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_programme_id FOREIGN KEY ("programme_id") REFERENCES programmes ("programme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
